value.description: US congressional STOCK Act trade disclosure records per (disclosure_date, ticker). Each cell contains a JSON array of trade events filed by members of Congress. Each event includes: amount range (amount_low, amount_high, amount_mid in USD), transaction_type (Purchase/Sale), asset_name, asset_type, member_id, chamber, cap_gains flag, and owner type (self/spouse/joint). Delivery lag is P45D (STOCK Act statutory maximum).

lineage.methodology: US congressional stock trade disclosures required under the Stop Trading on Congressional Knowledge (STOCK Act) of 2012. Each record is a Periodic Transaction Report (PTR) filed within 45 days of trade execution. House filings are timestamped with notification_date (date filed with the Clerk of the House); Senate filings are timestamped with year_filed (date filed with Senate EFD system). The time axis (pit_date) is derived as COALESCE(notification_date, year_filed) — the earliest publicly actionable date. Rows with no ticker (non-publicly-traded assets: bonds, money market funds) are excluded from the entity-indexed output. Trades are aggregated per (pit_date, ticker) as JSON arrays preserving all disclosure attributes including legislator identity, trade direction, and dollar-range amounts.

_spec_notes.pit_date_derivation: pit_date = COALESCE(notification_date, year_filed). Transform script must create this column before pivoting. House rows (n=35): use notification_date. Senate rows (n=1056): use year_filed.
_spec_notes.ticker_null_handling: Drop rows where ticker IS NULL (97 rows: bonds, money market funds, ETFs without tickers). These cannot be mapped to a Finter entity.
_spec_notes.dict_aggregation: Group by (pit_date, ticker), aggregate dict_columns into a JSON array. Each element in the array represents one trade event.
_spec_notes.entity_override: Entity overridden from Step 1 member_id (52% collision) to ticker (94% Finter match rate, 10% collision). Ticker-based view enables cross-dataset joins with price/fundamental data.
_spec_notes.time_override: Time axis overridden from Step 1 transaction_date (event date, not PIT) to pit_date (disclosure filing date, PIT-correct). delivery_lag=P45D is the STOCK Act statutory maximum.
_spec_notes.collision_rationale: 10% collision rate at (pit_date, ticker) reflects multiple members trading the same stock on the same disclosure date. dtype=dict preserves all individual trade records without loss.
